title: NVIDIA reports stronger data center demand
body: NVIDIA reported stronger-than-expected data center revenue as cloud providers continued spending on AI infrastructure. Management said demand for accelerated computing remains broad across hyperscale customers.

title: Federal Reserve officials signal caution on rate cuts
body: Federal Reserve officials signaled caution on near-term rate cuts after inflation data remained firmer than expected. Markets reduced expectations for aggressive easing as policymakers emphasized data dependence.

title: Regional bank shares fall on deposit pressure concerns
body: Regional bank shares declined after analysts warned that deposit costs and commercial real estate exposure could pressure profitability. Investors focused on funding stability and credit quality across smaller lenders.

title: Cloud providers increase AI infrastructure spending plans
body: Major cloud providers increased capital spending plans tied to AI infrastructure, including data centers, networking equipment, and GPU capacity. Suppliers tied to accelerated computing moved higher after the updates.

title: Semiconductor equipment orders improve on memory recovery
body: Semiconductor equipment orders improved as memory manufacturers prepared for a recovery in demand. Analysts said AI-related workloads and inventory normalization were supporting expectations for higher capital spending.

title: Oil prices rise after supply disruption concerns
body: Oil prices rose after supply disruption concerns outweighed softer demand indicators. Energy traders monitored geopolitical risk and inventory reports as crude benchmarks moved higher.
